name: Rail Vehicle Parts
rationale: Existing ZOLLERN market. US industry ~$20B (2025). ZOLLERN supplies hot-rolled and cold-drawn profiles for carbody structures, bogie frames, door frames. Constraint C10 (corrosion) mitigable via weathering steel S355J2W or zinc-rich primer. Certification-intensive (EN 15085-CL1, EN 12663).
entryStrategy: Reference only - existing market. Leverage EN 10204 3.1 traceability advantage in certification-heavy rail programs.
